final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese ethnic costume infographic for a national museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibition panel aesthetic — exact paper texture and typographic treatment is yours
Composition: must be structured infographic layout with five fixed zones: top header zone, left structural breakdown zone, upper-right material/texture zone, mid-right pattern/color symbolism zone, bottom wearing-order flowchart zone
Subject: must include a full-body Chinese ethnic costume ensemble as central focal element (realistic human figure or object breakdown depending on costume type)
Scene/backdrop: must be paper-textured background in rice-white / silk-paper white / light tea tones with museum-grade restraint
Lighting/mood: needs a scholarly, collectible atmosphere — exact light source is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, professional museum palette — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric texture swatches showing material differences and craftsmanship details
Text (verbatim): must include 简体中文 throughout — main title at top, subtitle, introduction, structural callout labels with leader lines, material descriptions, pattern symbolism explanations, color meaning annotations, wearing sequence steps, core feature summary
Constraints: must preserve all five layout zones as specified, must maintain infographic/scholarly plate format not poster/illustration/commercial style, must show structural accuracy and cultural authenticity, all text must be clear 简体中文 with no garbled characters or English
Avoid: poster aesthetics, studio photography feel, e-commerce styling, anime/illustration styling, cosplay aesthetics, incorrect labeling, blurred text, fake materials, excessive decoration
